# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why it matters.

## Contribution type

- [ ] Research critique
- [ ] Example or counterexample
- [ ] Related work
- [ ] Safety or governance
- [ ] Toy simulation
- [ ] Documentation cleanup

## Safety check

- [ ] This pull request does not include private, personal, sensitive,
      confidential, or non-consensual real-world information.
- [ ] Any real-world inspiration has been safely abstracted.
- [ ] Speculative claims are marked as speculative.

## Remaining uncertainty

Name any claim, citation, example, or framing choice that still needs review.
